description: home energy ab, dba home energy, is a swedish company specialized in the production and supply of small-scale renewable energy products, including solar, wind, and bioenergy solutions. the company serves industrial properties and businesses seeking sustainable energy solutions in sweden. home energy also operates as a service provider for the maintenance and support of its renewable energy products.
core_offerings: Combined Solar and Wind System Development
industry_name: Electrical Apparatus and Equipment, Wiring Supplies, and Related Equipment Merchant Wholesalers

description: baywa r.e. scandinavia ab, dba baywa r.e. scandinavia, is a swedish private company operating in the semiconductors sector, specializing in hardware and renewable energy semiconductor manufacturing. the company is also engaged in the development, service supply, wholesale, and energy solutions provision for solar, wind, and bioenergy. baywa r.e. scandinavia serves businesses, installers, developers, utility providers, investors, and governments globally, and is part of the baywa group.

description: tesla ocean turbine is a swedish renewable energy company specialized in the development and deployment of tidal energy harvesting systems. the company focuses on providing solutions for renewable energy investors and stakeholders seeking cost-effective and scalable tidal energy systems. its operations include project development and deployment of tidal energy technologies, with a particular emphasis on cost reduction and environmental impact reduction.

description: ikm inwind as, dba ikm inwind, is a norwegian company operating in the renewable energy sector, specializing in maintenance and inspection services, as well as the manufacturing of renewable energy semiconductors. the company provides services related to drivetrain components, mechanical and electrical rotating equipment, and high voltage applications, supporting the reliability and efficiency of renewable energy infrastructure.
core_offerings: Field Service Support for Renewable Energy Infrastructure
High Voltage Equipment Inspection and Repair

description: enercon is a swedish company operating in the renewable energy sector, specializing in wind electric power generation and related services. the company is active in environmental services and the renewables & environment domain, with production facilities on three continents and market representation in more than 40 countries. enercon is committed to sustainability.

windspider is a norwegian company specialized in the development and manufacturing of lifting solutions for the installation, maintenance, re-powering, and decommissioning of offshore and onshore wind turbines. the company operates primarily in the renewable energy sector, focusing on wind energy, and provides scalable, modular, and self-erecting lifting technologies that utilize wind turbine towers as support structures. windspider's products are compatible with existing vessels and barges, enabling cost-efficient operations and compliance with the jones act in the united states. the company also engages in hardware and renewable energy semiconductor manufacturing.

folksol stockholm ab, dba folksol, is a swedish company specialized in solar energy solutions, focusing on solar panels, smart batteries, and off-grid energy systems. the company operates as both a service provider and product manufacturer in the renewable energy sector, serving residential and off-grid energy consumers primarily in sweden. folksol emphasizes sustainability and energy efficiency in its operations.

novartis ag is a swiss multinational pharmaceutical corporation engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of pharmaceuticals, vaccines, generic drugs, contact lenses, diagnostics, animal health products, over-the-counter drugs, and veterinary medicine. the company operates in 118 countries and serves a global patient base, with a focus on therapeutic areas such as cardiovascular, renal and metabolic, immunology, neuroscience, and oncology. novartis also engages in research and development, including gene therapies, radioligand therapy, and rna therapies, and is involved in biotechnology and eyewear. the company is publicly traded and is committed to sustainability and ethical business practices.

lonza group ltd is a swiss contract development and manufacturing organization that provides integrated solutions for the healthcare industry, including biologics, small molecules, and specialized modalities. the company operates across three business platforms—integrated biologics, advanced synthesis, and specialized modalities—offering services such as custom manufacturing, product development, and detection systems for the pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors. lonza serves clients in europe, north america, and asia, and is publicly traded on the six swiss exchange and the sgx singapore exchange.

octapharma ag is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of human protein-based therapies. the company operates research and development, manufacturing, and plasma donation center facilities, and manages a global supply chain and logistics network to support its international operations. octapharma serves patients in 120 countries, with a focus on therapeutic areas such as haematology, immunotherapy, and critical care.
core_offerings: Coagulopathy and Bleeding Disorder Medicine Manufacturing

description: société des produits nestlé s.a., dba nestlé health science, is a swiss company specialized in nutritional science and health solutions. the company operates in the healthcare sector, offering products such as medical nutrition, active lifestyle nutrition, and pharmaceutical solutions for various life stages, including pediatrics and healthy aging. nestlé health science serves clients in over 140 countries and maintains a global supply chain with multiple factories and a network of scientific researchers and developers. the company is also involved in research and development and has a presence in the e-health and e-commerce domains.

ferring international center s.a. is a swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in the research, development, and manufacturing of pharmaceutical products and therapies for reproductive medicine, maternal health, gastroenterology, urology, and microbiome research. the company also operates as a pharmaceutical manufacturer and provides clinical research services. ferring serves markets in over 100 countries and maintains a global presence with offices and manufacturing sites in europe, the united states, asia, and south america.

galderma s.a. is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of dermatological treatments and skin care products. the company operates in the dermatology and pharmaceutical sectors, providing injectable aesthetics, dermatological skincare, and therapeutic dermatology solutions. galderma serves healthcare professionals and consumers globally, with operations in multiple countries and a network of subsidiaries and affiliates. the company is publicly traded on the six swiss exchange.

sumitomo pharma switzerland gmbh is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the manufacturing and distribution of pharmaceutical products, with a focus on oncology, urology, women’s health, rare diseases, cell and gene therapies, and central nervous system disorders. the company also conducts research and development activities, including drug discovery and product development, and is involved in co-promotion agreements. sumitomo pharma switzerland serves markets in the u.s., canada, and europe, and is part of a global network of subsidiaries and affiliates supporting its operations in these regions.

lonza group ltd, known as lonza capsules & health ingredients, is a swiss pharmaceutical and nutraceutical company engaged in capsule design, manufacturing, and encapsulation technology. the company provides products such as hard empty capsules, encapsulation equipment, and specialty health ingredients, serving customers in the pharmaceutical and nutraceutical industries worldwide. lonza capsules & health ingredients also offers technical and regulatory support, as well as manufacturing and technical services related to capsule design and encapsulation.

siegfried ag is a swiss contract development and manufacturing organization engaged in the production of active pharmaceutical ingredients, intermediates, and finished dosage forms. the company provides services including process development, optimization, registration, production, packaging, and logistics for pharmaceutical and chemical clients. siegfried operates multiple production sites in switzerland, germany, spain, france, malta, the usa, and china, and is iso certified. the company also engages in research and development activities and is a member of the dow jones sustainability index europe.

primary_naics.label: Research and Development in the Physical, Engineering, and Life Sciences (except Nanotechnology and Biotechnology)

description: psi cro ag is a swiss contract research organization that provides clinical research services, including clinical trial planning, execution, and site support for pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies. the company operates globally, with offices in multiple countries, and offers services in areas such as precision medicine, complex clinical trials, and pharmaceutical manufacturing. psi cro also develops proprietary tools for clinical trial feasibility assessment and planning.
industry_name: Research and Development in the Physical, Engineering, and Life Sciences (except Nanotechnology and Biotechnology)

description: acino international ag is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and international marketing of pharmaceuticals, including prescription medicines, over-the-counter products, and food supplements. the company operates in therapeutic areas such as aesthetics, allergology, cardiovascular diseases, and women’s health, and provides contract manufacturing and out-licensing services to pharmaceutical companies. acino also offers pharmacovigilance services and is certified in eu gmp and b-bbee. the company serves clients in over 90 countries, with a presence in the middle east, turkey, africa, ukraine, eurasian countries, and latin america.

corden pharma international gmbh, dba cordenpharma, is a swiss contract development and manufacturing organization specialized in the development and manufacturing of active pharmaceutical ingredients (apis), lipid excipients, drug products, injectables, peptides, oligonucleotides, and small molecules. the company serves pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies worldwide, providing contract manufacturing services for apis, drug products, and lipid excipients. cordenpharma operates a global network of cgmp facilities across europe and north america, and is certified to gmp standards. the company also develops technologies for the commercialization of highly potent medicines and is involved in the research and development of nanomedicines and other complex pharmaceutical modalities.
core_offerings: Solid Form and Polymorphism Technology Application

description: polypeptide group ag is a swiss contract development and manufacturing organization engaged in the development and manufacturing of peptide- and oligonucleotide-based active pharmaceutical ingredients and intermediates for pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies. the company provides services across pre-clinical, clinical, and commercial stages, including process development, gmp compliance, quality assurance, regulatory support, and commercial manufacturing. polypeptide operates gmp-certified facilities in europe, the united states, and india, and supports the development of therapies for both common and rare diseases. the company also engages in research and development, including the use of green chemistry principles and the development of neoantigen labs for immunotherapy.

idorsia pharmaceuticals ltd is a swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in the discovery, development, and commercialization of small molecule therapeutics. the company operates in the pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors, with activities including research and development, medical and pharmaceutical manufacturing, and the commercialization of pharmaceutical products. idorsia serves global markets through subsidiaries in multiple countries and is publicly traded on the swiss stock exchange.

stallergenes greer international ag is a swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in the diagnosis and treatment of allergies through allergen immunotherapy. the company develops and commercializes products for respiratory, food, and veterinary allergies, including sublingual and subcutaneous allergen immunotherapy, oral immunotherapy for peanut allergies, and veterinary allergen immunotherapy. stallergenes greer operates globally, with a presence in the nordic region and affiliates in multiple countries, and is involved in research and development, as well as the commercialization of allergy therapeutics.

ibsa institut biochimique sa is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the production of therapeutic products, including prescription drugs, over-the-counter medicines, medical devices, and food supplements. the company serves healthcare professionals and the pharmaceutical industry globally, with a focus on areas such as reproductive medicine, endocrinology, pain and inflammation, osteoarticular diseases, aesthetic medicine, dermatology, uro-gynaecology, cardiometabolic diseases, and respiratory diseases. ibsa also engages in licensing activities and international distribution, and is committed to sustainability through its operations and product development.

bachem ag is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development and manufacturing of peptides and oligonucleotides. the company provides products and services for research, clinical development, and commercial applications, including the production of biologically active peptides, amino acid derivatives, and biochemicals. bachem also offers cmc development, peptide and oligonucleotide new chemical entity development, commercial api manufacturing, custom peptide synthesis, research-grade production, diagnostics, and cosmetics. the company operates internationally, with facilities in switzerland, the united states, and asia, and is certified for gmp compliance.

alcon pharmaceuticals ltd. is a global pharmaceutical company engaged in ophthalmic pharmaceutical products and services, including surgical and vision care solutions. the company serves a broad market of over 260 million people in more than 140 countries, with a focus on research and development and a commitment to advancing access to eye care. alcon also operates as a provider of ophthalmic pharmaceutical products and services, with a presence in the united states and a global commercial footprint.

carbogen amcis ag, dba carbogen amcis, is a swiss pharmaceutical company that operates as a contract development and manufacturing organization (cdmo) for the pharmaceutical and biopharmaceutical sectors. the company provides contract chemical process research and development, api supply, drug product development, and contract research and manufacturing services. it also offers specialized services such as process research, high-potency api manufacturing, clean room facilities for antibody drug conjugates, and chromatography services. carbogen amcis serves clients globally from multiple sites in europe and asia.
core_offerings: Cholesterol and Vitamin D Analog Manufacturing

description: teoxane sa is a swiss medical equipment manufacturer engaged in the development and production of hyaluronic acid-based dermal fillers and dermocosmetics for aesthetic medicine. the company also provides training and support for healthcare professionals and patients, and operates internationally through subsidiaries and distributors in multiple regions. teoxane is certified for its products and complies with european regulations.

om pharma ltd., dba om pharma, is a swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in the development and commercialization of bacterial lysates and immunomodulators for the prevention and treatment of respiratory and urinary tract infections, as well as vascular diseases. the company operates internationally, distributing its products in over 100 countries and maintaining a presence in central america. om pharma also conducts research and development activities, including clinical trials and collaborations with other biotech firms, and is involved in the manufacturing of microbial-derived immunotherapeutic products for immunological disorders.

msd merck sharp & dohme ag is a swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in the research, development, manufacturing, and commercialization of medicines and vaccines. the company operates in multiple therapeutic areas, including oncology, infectious diseases, immunology, cardio-metabolic disorders, and vaccines. msd also provides analytical methods for new active substances and medicines, and manages a supply chain and logistics network for global distribution. the company is certified and participates in clinical trials and research activities.

abela pharm gmbh, dba abelapharm, is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, production, and distribution of natural and licensed dietary supplements. the company also operates as a manufacturer of pharmaceutical products and provides expertise in media and pharmaceutical marketing, as well as commercial knowledge related to dietary supplements. abelapharm serves a global market, with operations in multiple countries across europe, the balkans, and the middle east, and is expanding its presence in the uae.

primary_naics.label: Research and Development in Biotechnology (except Nanobiotechnology)

description: drugs for neglected diseases initiative is a swiss nonprofit research organization engaged in the development of treatments for neglected diseases. the organization conducts drug discovery, translational research, clinical trials, and advocacy, and collaborates with international partners to advance the development of new treatments for conditions such as sleeping sickness, visceral leishmaniasis, chagas disease, filariasis, paediatric hiv, cryptococcal meningitis, hepatitis c, dengue, and antimicrobial resistance. its activities include the creation of new chemical entities and the management of clinical trials, with a focus on sustainability and equitable access to treatments for neglected patients.
industry_name: Research and Development in Biotechnology (except Nanobiotechnology)

description: debiopharm international sa is a swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in drug development, manufacturing, and digital health investment. the company operates as a life science division within après-demain sa, managing research and development, clinical testing, and the commercialization of prescription drugs for oncology and bacterial infections. debiopharm also invests in digital health and smart data start-ups, and is involved in the development of antibody-drug conjugates, antibiotic-resistant infections, dna-damage response inhibition, and radioligand therapy. the company is certified and collaborates with partners and organizations to support its operations.
core_offerings: Patient Quality of Life Improvement Solutions

description: crispr therapeutics ag is a swiss-american biotechnology company engaged in gene editing technologies and gene-based medicines. the company develops therapies for a range of diseases, including hemoglobinopathies, immuno-oncology, autoimmune diseases, in vivo gene editing, and regenerative medicine. crispr therapeutics operates globally, with offices in switzerland, the united states, and the united kingdom, and maintains a manufacturing facility in the united states. the company also engages in strategic partnerships to advance its research and development activities.
core_offerings: Allogeneic CAR T Cell Therapy Development
Patient Advocacy and Community Engagement Services
In Vivo Gene Editing Therapy Development
Sustainability and Corporate Social Responsibility Services

description: alivedx suisse sa is a swiss biotechnology company engaged in in-vitro diagnostics. the company develops and supplies diagnostic products and platforms for clinical laboratories, including blood bank reagents and automated testing solutions. alivedx serves healthcare providers in hospitals, laboratories, and clinics, and operates internationally with offices in the uk, us, uae, and other regions. the company is certified for employee well-being and incorporates sustainability practices in its operations.
core_offerings: Multiplexing and Multimodality Testing Platform Development

description: helsinn healthcare sa is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the research, development, manufacturing, and commercialization of pharmaceuticals, medical devices, and nutritional supplements. the company operates in oncology, rare diseases, and supportive care, and manages a global portfolio of products approved in multiple countries. helsinn also provides licensing services, including in-licensing, partnering, and business development, and maintains a pharmacovigilance system for adverse event monitoring. the company is certified for sustainability and ethical standards, and its operations are supported by a hybrid manufacturing approach and a global presence with offices in ireland, the united states, and china.

trb chemedica international sa, dba trb chemedica, is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of hyaluronic acid-based medical devices, medical food supplements, and pharmaceutical products. the company operates a swiss manufacturing facility and maintains subsidiaries and distributors in multiple countries across asia, south america, europe, and the united kingdom. trb chemedica is iso certified and is active in the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device sectors, with a focus on ophthalmology, rheumatology, and neurology.

celonic ag is a swiss biotechnology company engaged in the development and manufacturing of biologics, including monoclonal antibodies, bispecifics, and other complex molecules. the company provides services from cell line development to commercial manufacturing, and also offers fill and finish services through a third-party strategic alliance partner. celonic operates globally, with offices in switzerland and germany, and is committed to sustainability and stewardship in its operations.

adc therapeutics sa is a swiss biotechnology company engaged in the research, development, manufacturing, and commercialization of antibody drug conjugates (adcs) for the treatment of hematological malignancies and solid tumors. the company operates globally, with offices in switzerland, the uk, and the usa, and is involved in clinical development, manufacturing, and commercialization of adc-based therapies. adc therapeutics also conducts research and development activities, including the advancement of next-generation adcs and the development of combination therapies.
core_offerings: Antibody Drug Conjugate Research and Development

description: tillotts pharma ag is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, in/out-licensing, and marketing of pharmaceutical products for gastroenterology, with a focus on inflammatory bowel diseases. the company also operates as a contract manufacturer and conducts research and development in controlled release technologies. tillotts pharma serves global markets through affiliates and strategic partnerships, and is part of the japanese zeria group.

kd pharma group sa is a swiss contract development and manufacturing organization engaged in pharmaceutical and nutraceutical solutions. the company provides services in custom synthesis, purification, separation, chemical synthesis, encapsulation, packaging, and the production of finished dosage forms for pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, and specialty chemical markets. kd pharma group also operates as a manufacturer of apis for omega-3 pharmaceuticals and nutraceuticals, and offers formulation and encapsulation services. the company is certified and is a member of the deutsche medizinal-cannabis gesellschaft.
core_offerings: Softgel and Liquid Dosage Form Manufacturing

description: a. menarini gmbh is a swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of medicinal products for primary and specialty care, with a focus on cardiovascular diseases, pain management, infectiology, allergology, and urology. the company also operates in medical aesthetics and provides laboratory services. a. menarini serves both general practitioners and specialists, and is part of a global network with a presence in 140 countries.
